allow:
Bash(git add apps/mobile/src/services/auth.ts apps/mobile/src/screens/driver/FeedScreen.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix\(mobile\): add role field to registration, sync GPS location to Firestore

- Add missing role: 'sender' to createUserDocument\(\) in auth.ts
  \(was only set in useAuth.register\(\), not in the service function\)
- Sync driver's device GPS location to Firestore on FeedScreen mount
  so geohash-based nearby queries and notifications work correctly
- Use static import for encodeGeohash instead of require\(\)
EOF
\)")
Bash(git checkout development 2>&1 && git merge main --no-edit 2>&1 && git push origin development 2>&1)
